We are looking for a reliable and talented graphic designer to work with us on an ongoing basis. Projects will vary but typically include: Logo design and brand identity Business cards and marketing materials Website design (UI/UX) Landing pages and web graphics Social media graphics General design support as required Requirements: Excellent English communication skills Strong understanding of branding and visual design Experience with UX/UI and modern web design Ability to follow briefs and ask questions when needed Reliable and responsive Available for ongoing, ad-hoc work Please include in your application: Portfolio showing logo and branding work Examples of UX/UI or website designs Your hourly rate Your typical turnaround time Confirmation that you are comfortable communicating in English via messages and occasional calls We are looking to build a long-term relationship with the right designer and will have regular work available.

Hi, I'm looking for a designer to turn my document into a professional digital guide/PDF. I don't want it to look like a basic document. I want it to be visually appealing, easy to read, and feel like a premium resource. What I'm looking for: • Professional cover page • Clean and modern layout • Consistent branding, colors, and fonts • Infographics to simplify information • Icons, graphics, and visual elements throughout • Tables, comparison charts, and checklists where needed • Callout boxes for important tips and key information • Clickable table of contents and links • Mobile-friendly design The content is focused on healthcare/nursing education and career pathways, so experience designing eBooks, guides, workbooks, or digital products is a plus. Final deliverables: • Editable Canva file (preferred) • High-quality PDF • Mobile-optimized version Please share samples of similar digital products you've designed.

  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: 1 to 3 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

Graphic Designer — Contract Remote-friendly · Ongoing · Figma required · Start ASAP Everlab is Australia's leading preventive health and longevity clinic. We're a fast-moving marketing team with a strong visual identity, a growing content pipeline, and a lot on our plate. We're looking for a sharp contract designer to plug in immediately and help us execute across social, email, and ad formats — no hand-holding required. What you'll be working on Social content — Feed posts, stories, and carousel assets across Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. Channel-appropriate sizing and formatting is a must — you should know what performs where. EDMs — Email design assets and templates aligned to our brand. Clean, elevated layouts that hold up at small sizes and in dark mode. Paid ad creative — Static ad assets for Meta campaigns across multiple formats and sizes. Experience with performance-driven design is a bonus. Ad hoc requests — Presentations, one-pagers, partner assets, and anything else the team needs turned around quickly. Volume is real — flexibility is key. What we need from you Figma proficiency — You live in Figma. Components, auto-layout, shared styles — second nature. Brand discipline — We have a defined style guide. You'll work within it — not around it. Elevated design eye — You know the difference between good and great. Health and wellness aesthetics are a plus. Channel awareness — You understand how design behaves differently across Instagram, email, and paid — and you design accordingly. Responsive and reliable — Fast turnarounds, clear communication, no chasing required. High volume comfort — We have a lot on. You can manage a queue, prioritise, and produce at pace. About the engagement Hours are flexible — we're not committing to a fixed weekly number upfront because our output needs fluctuate. What we can say is there's consistent work, and the right person will find there's plenty to get into. We're open to discussing a day-rate or hourly structure depending on your preference. This is a BAU-first role, but it touches the full breadth of our marketing output. If you're motivated by quality output, enjoy working in a tight-knit team, and like seeing your work go live quickly — this is a good fit.

I’ve already completed the design concept, content, and imagery for two connected brands — Oasis Commercial Cleaning and Bridgeview Homecare. The brochure layout and visuals are defined; I simply need a designer to professionally format and prepare the print‑ready tri‑fold brochure using the provided mockups, photos, and branding kit. Your role: Recreate the provided mockups in Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, or Canva Pro Ensure proper print setup (bleed, margins, alignment, color accuracy) Apply brand colors, fonts, and logo placement consistently Deliver high‑resolution, print‑ready PDF and source files Deliverables: 1 tri‑fold brochure (Oasis + Bridgeview collaboration) Print‑ready PDF Editable source file (AI, INDD, or Canva link) Assets Provided: Mockups (visual references) Photos and written content Branding kit for both brands Style: Clean, premium, wellness‑oriented — consistent with Oasis’s professional aesthetic and Bridgeview’s holistic tone.

Graphic Designer – Directory Update Project We are looking for a detail-oriented Graphic Designer to update and refresh an existing 80-page directory. The project involves updating text, imagery, advertisements, layouts, and formatting while ensuring consistency across the entire document. The ideal candidate will have strong layout and typography skills, experience working with large multi-page documents, and an eye for clean, professional design. Must be able to use Adobe Creative Suite Responsibilities: * Update and edit an existing 80-page directory * Replace and format text, images, and advertisements * Maintain brand consistency and visual hierarchy throughout the document * Ensure all pages are print-ready and professionally formatted * Liaise with our team regarding revisions and updates * Prepare final files for print and/or digital distribution Requirements: * Proven experience in editorial, publication, or directory design * Strong Adobe InDesign skills (essential) * High attention to detail and formatting consistency * Ability to work efficiently with large documents and multiple revisions * Experience preparing print-ready artwork * Good communication and time management skills Bonus: * Experience working with community directories, magazines, catalogues, or business publications * Basic understanding of branding and layout strategy Please provide: * Examples of similar work * Estimated turnaround time * Your rates or project pricing This is a freelance/project-based role with the potential for ongoing design work.

I'm looking for a talented Canva designer to help refresh my website and improve its overall look and flow. This is not a full website redesign. The website is already in place, but I'd like a fresh pair of eyes to make it look more polished, professional, and easier for visitors to navigate. What I'm looking for: Strong Canva design skills Good eye for layout, branding, and visual presentation Ability to suggest and implement simple improvements Experience improving website user flow and overall appearance Someone who can work independently and make sensible recommendations The project may include: Refreshing existing graphics and visuals Improving page layouts and content presentation Enhancing the overall user experience and flow Making the website look cleaner, more modern, and more engaging When applying, please send: Examples of Canva work you've completed Any websites you've helped improve A brief note on how you would approach a website refresh I'm looking for someone creative, practical, and detail-oriented who can make meaningful improvements without turning this into a major redesign project.

Experienced Graphic Designer Needed for Ongoing Brand & Marketing Assets Job Description About the Project We are looking for a talented, creative, and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to help us elevate our visual brand. We need someone who can take a creative brief and turn it into clean, modern, and engaging visual assets. This starts as a single project with the potential for ongoing, long-term freelance work for the right candidate. Scope of Work Your day-to-day responsibilities will include designing: Digital Marketing Assets: Social media graphics (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook), ad banners, and email newsletter templates. Print & Presentation Materials: PDF slide decks, pitch templates, and occasional marketing flyers or brochures. Brand Consistency:Maintaining and applying our existing brand guidelines across all new assets. Required Skills & Qualifications Experience: 3+ years of professional graphic design experience (agency or freelance). Tools: Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Figma or Canva (for collaborative templates). Communication:Strong English communication skills and ability to take constructive feedback. Organization: Clean file management (layered files, proper naming conventions) and ability to meet strict deadlines. Project Type: Ongoing / Part-time (approx. 10–15 hours per week to start). How to Apply To be considered for this role, please submit your proposal with: 1. A link to your **portfolio** or attachments of your 3 best, most relevant design pieces. 2. A brief paragraph explaining your experience working with brand guidelines. Note to Applicants: All hiring, communication, and payments will be handled strictly through Upwork. We respect your time and skills, and we do not request unpaid custom sample work.

Graphic Designer / Apparel Designer for Premium Outdoor Lifestyle Brand – DEWDROPZ DEWDROPZ (Feel Alive) is a premium outdoor lifestyle brand inspired by trekking, travel, nature, and slow outdoor living. We are building a cinematic outdoor culture brand rooted in emotional storytelling, quiet adventure, freedom, and timeless design. We are looking for a highly creative Graphic Designer / Apparel Designer to create original apparel graphics and help shape the DEWDROPZ visual identity across: • T-Shirts • Sweatshirts • Hoodies • Caps • Bags • Bottles • Future merchandise Design direction: • Cinematic outdoor storytelling • Emotional minimalism • Vintage travel aesthetics • Premium typography • Rugged yet refined visual language The work should feel: Adventurous • Reflective • Timeless • Atmospheric • Nature-inspired Responsibilities • Create original apparel graphic concepts • Develop collection-based visual systems • Create typography-led and illustration-led designs • Prepare production-ready artwork for DTF and screen printing • Maintain a consistent DEWDROPZ visual identity Required Skills • Graphic Design • Typography • Apparel Graphics • Merchandise Design • Print Production Knowledge Software preferred: Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, CorelDRAW, Figma, Canva, Kittl, or equivalent. Project Scope (Initial Paid Phase) • Design for 2–3 collection themes (themes and creative direction provided by DEWDROPZ) • Create 8–10 original concepts per theme • Refine selected concepts and prepare final production-ready artwork Long-Term Opportunity Future expansion planned: • 10–15 collection themes • Approx. 20 concepts per collection • Additional merchandise categories To Apply Please share: Portfolio (especially apparel work) Instagram / Behance / social links Previous T-shirt / merchandise projects Pricing structure Turnaround time We are looking for someone who can connect with the DEWDROPZ vision and help build a long-term visual world—not simply create graphics.

We are looking for an experienced Graphic Designer with strong skills in photo editing, vector design, layout design, and content creation to join our team immediately. You will be responsible for creating: High-end catalogue designs Flyers and marketing materials Social media posts and campaigns Presentation and promotional materials Basic motion graphics and short-form video content Required Skills: Adobe Illustrator Adobe Photoshop Adobe InDesign CapCut Adobe After Effects Other relevant design, animation, and video editing software We're looking for someone who can work efficiently, communicate clearly, and deliver high-quality designs with a fast turnaround. Immediate Task (Today) For today's project, we need a designer who can take an AI-generated presentation design and recreate it as a fully editable Adobe Illustrator vector file, organized with proper layers and structure according to our brand guidelines.   • $400K+ spent
  • Location United States
  • Hourly: $15.00 - $40.00
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: More than 6 months, 30+ hrs/week

I'm looking for a highly skilled freelance graphic designer to support a growing portfolio of design projects on an ongoing basis. This is not a one-off assignment. The right person will become a trusted creative partner and work directly with me across multiple projects each month. There is a significant amount of work in the pipeline, and this opportunity has the potential to grow into a long-term, high-value engagement for the right candidate. *** What I'm Looking For *** I am not looking for someone who simply follows instructions and executes revisions. I'm looking for a designer who can take ownership of projects from concept through completion. You should be able to think strategically, contribute creative ideas, identify potential issues before they become problems, and deliver polished, professional work with minimal hand-holding. Strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to work independently are critical. *** Types of Projects *** Projects may include: 1. Corporate brochures and company profiles 2. Investor presentations and pitch decks 3. Investment guides and educational resources 4. Marketing collateral 5. Digital advertising creative 6. Social media graphics 7. Trade show and event materials 8. Brand guideline documents 9. Website and landing page design assets 10. Other business and marketing-related design projects *** Preferred Experience *** While not required, preference will be given to candidates with experience working with: 1. Commercial real estate firms 2. Real estate developers 3. Investment firms 4. Financial services organizations 5. Professional services companies Experience designing materials intended for investors, executives, or high-net-worth audiences is a significant plus. *** Requirements *** 1. Strong portfolio showcasing professional business-focused design work 2. Ability to manage projects from initial concept through final delivery 3. Excellent visual design and layout skills 4. Strong understanding of branding and visual consistency 5. High level of responsiveness and communication 6. Ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment 7. Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite and/or Figma 8. Fluent written and spoken English *** To Apply *** Please include: 1. A link to your portfolio 2. Examples of your best corporate, investor, financial, or commercial real estate-related work 3. A brief description of your design process 4. Your availability and typical turnaround times 5. Why you believe you would be a good fit for a long-term working relationship I'm looking for quality, professionalism, responsiveness, and someone who takes pride in delivering exceptional work.

We are seeking a talented junior graphic designer to join our marketing team on a part-time retainer basis (approximately 20 hours per week). This is a long-term engagement for the right candidate. You will work directly with our marketing leadership to produce polished, brand-consistent assets across digital, print, and event channels. What You Will Work On Marketing collateral including one-pagers, brochures, sell sheets, and capability decks Event graphics including booth panels, banners, signage, and conference materials Social media graphics primarily for LinkedIn Email header graphics and campaign visual assets Presentation templates and slide design in PowerPoint Occasional video thumbnail and short-form visual content What We Are Looking For 1-3 years of graphic design experience, preferably in B2B, healthcare, or life sciences Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud (Illustrator, InDesign, Photoshop required; Premiere or After Effects a plus) Experience working within defined brand guidelines -- this is not a creative-from-scratch role; brand consistency is the priority Reliable, responsive communication with a typical 24-48 hour turnaround on standard assets English proficiency sufficient for written briefing interpretation and light revision discussions Portfolio demonstrating clean, professional B2B or technical marketing design (life sciences experience preferred but not required) What to Expect Working With Us You will receive detailed creative briefs for each project. Our brand guidelines, color palette, typography standards, and approved asset library will be provided during onboarding. We value designers who ask good questions upfront and deliver clean files with organized layers and properly packaged assets. We operate in US Central Time. Overlap of at least 4 hours during business hours (8am-5pm CT) is required. To Apply Please submit your portfolio or 3-5 relevant work samples. B2B, healthcare, or technical marketing samples are weighted most heavily. Include a brief note on your experience working within brand guidelines and your typical turnaround time for a standard one-pager asset.

  • Proposals: 20 to 50

Job Description: We’re looking for a Graphic Designer to support our team with the creation of visual content. This role will focus mainly on social media design, with occasional support on branding applications and print materials. This is a good fit for someone with intermediate design skills who can follow direction, work within established brand guidelines, and produce clean, professional design work consistently. Responsibilities: Design social media posts, carousels, and story formats Adapt designs for different platforms and dimensions Apply brand guidelines consistently across assigned tasks Support branding-related design needs such as logo placements, brand assets, and layout adaptations Assist with simple print materials such as flyers, brochures, and promotional pieces Make revisions based on feedback Organize and deliver final files on time

Logo Designer Needed for Bread Production Company We are looking for a talented graphic designer to create a professional and memorable logo for our bread production company. Company Name: Manan About Us: Manan is a company specializing in the production of bread and bakery products. We are looking for a logo that reflects quality, freshness, trust, and tradition while maintaining a modern and recognizable appearance. Requirements: * Create a unique and professional logo for the Manan brand. * The logo should be suitable for packaging, social media, website, signage, and marketing materials. * Experience in branding and food industry logos is preferred. * Provide several initial concepts and revisions if needed. * Final files should include vector formats (AI, EPS, SVG) and high-resolution PNG/JPG versions. When Applying, Please Include: * Portfolio of previous logo designs. * Estimated timeline for completion. * Proposed budget. We look forward to working with a creative designer who can help build a strong visual identity for the Manan brand.

    4.86 Stars, based on 46 feedbacks
  • $80K+ spent
  • Location Vietnam
  • Fixed price
  • Entry Level
  • Est. budget: $250.00

I am setting up a Facebook Page and need a graphic designer to create a professional visual identity for it. Please review the party website for context, message, tone, and organisational identity: https://australianrenaissanceparty.org.au/ The website currently uses a deliberately black-and-white aesthetic as a metaphor: “it’s black and white.” The Facebook design does not need to copy this visual style. The Facebook page may use a broader, more engaging visual treatment suitable for social media, provided it remains serious, credible, and consistent with the party’s civic tone. Scope of work Please design a Facebook Page visual package including: Facebook cover image Desktop and mobile-safe layout Clear central message Must crop well across Facebook desktop and mobile views Profile image Logo or emblem-style image "ARP" Must remain clear when shown as a small circular icon Pinned post graphic A strong “start here” or introductory graphic Suitable for explaining the page’s purpose at a glance Post templates 3–5 reusable Facebook post templates For announcements, quotes/statements, article links, event notices, and general updates Optional Simple brand colour palette Font recommendations Canva-editable templates Basic usage guide showing how the assets should be used Desired style Professional, clean, credible, and suitable for a public-facing organisation. The design should feel serious and trustworthy rather than flashy or gimmicky. The page should work as a public noticeboard and trust-building channel, with clear visual links back to the main website/brand. There must be a discreet but readable footer/watermark area on relevant Facebook graphics for an AEC authorisation statement. For mock-ups, you may use placeholder text such as: “Authorised by [Name], [Party/Organisation], [Suburb, State]”. This is placeholder text only. The final legal wording will be provided separately and must be inserted exactly as supplied. Deliverables Please provide: Final Facebook cover image Final profile image Pinned post graphic 3–5 post templates Editable source files, preferably Canva, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma Exported PNG/JPEG files ready for upload Clear notes on image dimensions and safe areas Important constraints Please do not propose a custom Facebook layout or website-style redesign. Facebook Pages have limited design flexibility. The goal is to create strong branded assets that work inside Facebook’s standard layout. Freelancer requirements The ideal freelancer should have: Experience designing Facebook Page assets A portfolio showing social media branding work Good understanding of desktop/mobile cropping Ability to create clean, reusable templates Experience with Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or Figma Suggested milestone structure: Initial concept direction Cover/profile image draft Post template set Final exported files and editable templates

Skilled Graphic Designer Needed — 10–20 hrs/week, Ongoing We're looking for a reliable graphic designer to join us on an ongoing basis for 10–20 hours per week. This is a consistent, long-term role, so we're prioritizing designers who want steady work and can maintain quality over time. What you'll do: Design marketing assets Produce branded collateral Iterate quickly based on feedback while keeping brand consistency What we're looking for: Strong portfolio demonstrating range and polish (please share a link) Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and/or Figma Clear visual hierarchy, typography, and layout instincts — we want a real designer, not a template-filler Responsive communication and consistent weekly availability Bonus: motion/animation, light video editing, or illustration To apply, please include: A link to your portfolio (applications without one will be skipped) 2–3 sentences on a project you're proud of and why Your hourly rate and time zone Looking forward to seeing your work.
